assets.title: What Is an LLM?
assets.alt: A prompt ribbon enters a folded-paper model cloud and one response-token glow emerges.
assets.caption: A polished concept image will show a prompt entering a learned model space and one token emerging while the HTML callouts carry the exact mechanics.

callouts.label: Context enters
callouts.text: The current prompt and response-so-far become visible input for this run.

callouts.label: Weights shape probabilities
callouts.text: Learned weights, built earlier, shape next-token scores.

callouts.label: One token emerges
callouts.text: The model selects one response token and appends it.

assets.notes: What Is an LLM? remains on the current coded/generated visual in v0.28.7 because no optimized asset and thumbnail were provided.
assets.missingReason: missing optimized asset and thumbnail as of v0.28.7

assets.title: Pretraining
assets.alt: Many blank paper streams shape glowing model pattern layers before use.
assets.caption: A future concept image will show broad pattern learning from many examples without implying perfect source memory.

callouts.label: Many examples
callouts.text: Pretraining repeats the training loop across large collections of examples.

callouts.label: Weights change
callouts.text: Prediction errors drive repeated durable updates.

callouts.label: Not memory
callouts.text: Pretraining does not create a searchable copy of every source.

assets.missingReason: missing optimized asset and thumbnail as of v0.28.7

assets.title: Alignment
assets.alt: Folded paths and light guardrails suggest behavior shaping without a conscious model.
assets.caption: A future concept image will show behavior shaping and guardrails while HTML keeps the conscience boundary explicit.

callouts.label: Behavior shaping
callouts.text: Training and system design can encourage preferred response patterns.

callouts.label: Guardrails
callouts.text: Runtime safeguards can reduce risky paths during use.

callouts.label: No conscience
callouts.text: Alignment does not give the model moral understanding.

assets.title: Multimodal AI
assets.alt: Text, image, audio, and video-like paper forms flow into a shared representation field.
assets.caption: A future concept image will show multiple media types represented together without implying human sensation.

callouts.label: Multiple media
callouts.text: Text, image, audio, video, or code can enter some systems.

callouts.label: Representation
callouts.text: The system encodes media into usable representations or linked spaces.

callouts.label: Not sensation
callouts.text: Multimodal processing is not human experience.

assets.title: The Perfect Storm
assets.alt: Several folded-paper streams converge into one modern capability cloud.
assets.caption: A future concept image will show convergence without placing all ingredient labels inside a cramped diagram.

callouts.label: Data
callouts.text: Human-created data supplied patterns.

callouts.label: Scale
callouts.text: Compute and storage made large training practical.

callouts.label: Methods and incentives
callouts.text: Methods, labor, and demand moved systems into products.

assets.title: Collective Intelligence, Extracted
assets.alt: Human-created documents, code, art, and media flow into a glowing folded-paper model shape, then into generated media traces.
assets.caption: Human-created traces flow into learned model patterns while provenance and responsibility remain human questions.

callouts.label: Human traces
callouts.text: Writing, code, art, research, forums, and documentation can leave learnable traces.

callouts.label: Collection questions
callouts.text: Provenance, consent, copyright, attribution, and compensation matter.

callouts.label: Model limit
callouts.text: The model absorbs statistical patterns without responsibility.

assets.notes: Accepted live in v0.28.7. Text check: no readable embedded text; abstract source traces are symbolic texture. Uses HTML caption and callouts for all instructional language.

assets.title: Costs We Must Count
assets.alt: A glowing answer card is connected to hidden infrastructure, labor, privacy, and governance shapes.
assets.caption: A future concept image will make hidden infrastructure and social costs visible without inventing metrics.

callouts.label: Infrastructure
callouts.text: Energy, water, carbon, data centers, chips, and e-waste vary by system and workload.

callouts.label: Human systems
callouts.text: Labor, privacy, bias, and information quality depend on deployment choices.

callouts.label: Power
callouts.text: Data, compute, capital, and governance affect who benefits and who decides.

assets.missingReason: missing optimized asset and thumbnail as of v0.28.7

assets.title: Risk vs Myth
assets.alt: A grounded review path sits beside fading myth shapes, suggesting practical risk literacy.
assets.caption: A future concept image will separate practical risk literacy from unsupported myths without fear-heavy imagery.

callouts.label: Real mechanisms
callouts.text: Privacy exposure, hallucination, tool misuse, overreliance, and bias can cause practical harm.

callouts.label: Myths
callouts.text: Conscious chatbots and secret self-training during every chat are unsupported claims.

callouts.label: Accountability
callouts.text: Institutions, vendors, policies, and affected communities shape prevention and review.

assets.notes: Risk vs Myth remains on the current coded/generated visual in v0.28.7 because no optimized asset and thumbnail were provided.
assets.missingReason: missing optimized asset and thumbnail as of v0.28.7

assets.title: Benefits Worth Taking Seriously
assets.alt: A calm folded-paper tool garden shows useful AI supports with review lanterns.
assets.caption: A future concept image will show bounded, reviewed benefits without hype.

callouts.label: Useful with review
callouts.text: Accessibility, translation, summarization, search, drafting, and coding help can be useful with review.

callouts.label: Needs safeguards
callouts.text: Tutoring, research triage, brainstorming, and workflows need context and evaluation.

callouts.label: Evidence matters
callouts.text: Broad replacement or no-cost claims should not be treated as fact.

assets.title: Human-Centered AI
assets.alt: Human-centered decision shapes surround a support card, with review and governance rails visible.
assets.caption: A future concept image will place dignity, human judgment, review, and governance ahead of automation.

callouts.label: Human judgment
callouts.text: People remain accountable for high-stakes decisions and institutional use.

callouts.label: Dignity
callouts.text: Speed, profit, and automation should not outrank persons, learning, or relationships.

callouts.label: Model limit
callouts.text: A model can sound ethical without moral understanding.

assets.title: Better AI Is a Choice
assets.alt: Folded paths and abstract levers suggest better AI as a human choice.
assets.caption: A future concept image will show better AI as a set of human design and governance choices, not destiny.

callouts.label: Technical choices
callouts.text: Task fit, retrieval, evaluation, and efficiency can shape outcomes.

callouts.label: Data choices
callouts.text: Provenance, consent, licensing, compensation, and privacy matter.

callouts.label: Institutional choices
callouts.text: Review, policy, labor planning, and independent evaluation shape use.

assets.title: Model Literate Synthesis
assets.alt: A compass, lantern, and folded map integrate model mechanics, evidence checking, and human responsibility.
assets.caption: A future concept image will close the Journey with mechanics, evidence, and human responsibility while HTML callouts stay precise.

callouts.label: Mechanics
callouts.text: Prompts become tokens, scores, probabilities, and generated tokens.

callouts.label: Evidence
callouts.text: Fluent output still needs checking.

callouts.label: Responsibility
callouts.text: Humans remain accountable for use, review, and decisions.
